about.bio: I am Dr. Nazir Ahmad Shekari, a urological surgeon specializing in endourology and andrology. Over the past five years, I have been working in the diagnosis and treatment of a wide range of urological diseases, and I always strive to choose the best scientific and minimally invasive methods for each patient.

footer.subscribe_text: Subscribe for health tips and updates
footer.subscribe_success: Thank you for subscribing to our updates!
footer.address: Afghanistan, Herat, Chahar-e-rahi- Badmorghan, Jami Hospital

home.intro: Urological surgeon with over 15 years of experience in diagnosing and treating diseases of the urinary tract and kidneys. Focusing on minimally invasive surgeries and modern medical standards.

contact.contact_description: Contact our urology clinic in Herat, Afghanistan. Book appointments, emergency consultations, or get answers to your medical questions.

contact.faq_q1: How do I book an appointment with Dr. Shekari?
contact.faq_a1: You can book appointments in three ways: 1) Call our appointment line at 070 445 3030, 2) Use the online form on this page, or 3) Visit our clinic at Jami Hospital during working hours. New patients should arrive 15 minutes early for registration.
contact.faq_q2: What should I bring to my first appointment?
contact.faq_a2: Please bring: 1) National ID or passport, 2) Previous medical records and test results, 3) Current medications list, 4) Insurance information if applicable, 5) Referral letter from your doctor (if any).
contact.faq_q3: How long does a typical consultation last?
contact.faq_a3: Initial consultations typically last 30-45 minutes to allow thorough evaluation. Follow-up visits are usually 15-20 minutes. Complex cases may require more time.
contact.faq_q4: Can I get a same-day emergency appointment?
contact.faq_a4: Yes, we reserve slots for emergencies daily. Call +93 79 245 3030 for immediate assistance. Urgent cases are prioritized.
contact.faq_a5: Seek immediate care for: 1) Severe kidney pain with fever, 2) Inability to urinate, 3) Heavy blood in urine with clots, 4) Testicular torsion symptoms (sudden severe pain), 5) Post-operative complications like excessive bleeding.
contact.faq_a6: Yes, our emergency urology service operates 24 hours a day, 7 days a week. Call +93 79 245 3030 at any time for emergencies. An on-call urologist is always available.
contact.faq_q7: Do I need to call before coming for emergency?
contact.faq_a7: While not required, calling ahead helps us prepare for your arrival. For critical emergencies, come directly and our staff will assist immediately upon arrival.
contact.faq_q8: What emergency equipment do you have available?
contact.faq_a8: We have complete emergency facilities including: ultrasound machines, emergency surgery theater, dialysis equipment, blood bank access, and critical care monitoring systems.
contact.faq_q9: What urological conditions do you treat?
contact.faq_a9: We specialize in: kidney stones, prostate disorders, male infertility, urinary tract infections, bladder cancer, pediatric urology, erectile dysfunction, and minimally invasive surgeries including robotic and laser procedures.
contact.faq_a10: Yes, we have a state-of-the-art robotic surgery system. Dr. Rajesh Kumar (our Indian specialist) performs robotic prostatectomies, kidney surgeries, and reconstructive procedures with minimal invasiveness.
contact.faq_q11: What diagnostic tests are available at your clinic?
contact.faq_a11: We offer comprehensive diagnostics: ultrasound, CT scans, urodynamic testing, cystoscopy, PSA testing, semen analysis, 24-hour urine collection, and advanced blood work. Most results are available within 24 hours.
contact.faq_a12: Absolutely. We provide second opinion consultations where our international team reviews your case. Bring all medical records for comprehensive evaluation.
contact.faq_a13: Regular hours: Monday-Saturday 8:00 AM - 8:00 PM, Sunday 9:00 AM - 2:00 PM. Emergency services: 24/7. Administrative office: 8:00 AM - 5:00 PM weekdays.
contact.faq_q14: What languages are spoken at your clinic?
contact.faq_a14: Our team is multilingual: Dari, Pashto, English, Hindi, and Urdu. International patients can request an English-speaking doctor or interpreter services.
contact.faq_q15: Is parking available at your facility?
contact.faq_a15: Yes, we have ample free parking for patients and visitors. Valet service is available for patients with mobility issues. The parking area is monitored 24/7 for security.
contact.faq_a16: We accept most major insurance providers. Please bring your insurance card. For international patients, we provide detailed invoices for insurance claims. Cash and credit cards are also accepted.
